DISCOVERY 302, JUDGE PRO-TEM ANDERSEN DISCLOSED THAT HE USED TO WORK WITH MS. MOORE WHO IS SPECIALLY APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF BUT THIS IS NOT A BASIS FOR HIS RECUSAL. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC'S MOTION FOR ORDER THAT MATTERS IN REQ. FOR ADMISSION OF TRUTH OF FACTS BE ADMITTED AND FOR MONETARY SANCTION AGAINST DEFENDANT IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION WAS RECEIVED. THE REQUESTS ARE DEEMED ADMITTED. SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $332.50 ARE ALSO GRANTED AND ARE TO BE PAID BY DEFENDANT WITHIN 10 DAYS OF THE ORDER. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE PRO TEM: PHILIP M. ANDERSEN; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; NOT REPORTED. =302/JPT

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Aug-04-2014 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Aug-04-2014 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from The Presiding Judge Department 206 for Entry of Judgment.
Department 514, Judge: John Dearman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840.

David Marcolini, Esq., appearing specially for Plaintiff PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC.
No appearance on behalf or by Defendant ADI SIMHAYOF.
Declaration of Lara Letellier pursuant to CCP 98, submitted in lieu of testimony.
After evidence, Court ordered the following Judgment entered in favor of PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC., and against Defendant ADI SIMAHAYOF as follows:
Damages $12,292.72
Pre-Judgment Interest $0.00
Attorney's Fees $0.00
Costs $489.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $12,781.72
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-21-2014 Set For Trial On Aug-04-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Order That Matters In Req. For Admission Of Truth Of Facts Be Admitted And For Monetary Sanction Against Deft
Off Calendar Mar-19-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. JILL BATES-MOORE, TEL. NO. (510) 985-9250 SPECIALLY APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - Judge Pro-tem Andersen disclosed that he used to work with Ms. Moore who is specially appearing for the Plaintiff but this is not a basis for his recusal. The court adopted its tentative ruling: PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC'S MOTION For Order That Matters In Req. For Admission Of Truth Of Facts Be Admitted And For Monetary Sanction Against Defendant is Granted. No opposition was received. The requests are deemed admitted. Sanctions in the amount of $332.50 are also granted and are to be paid by defendant within 10 days of the order. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge Pro Tem: Philip M. Andersen; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not Reported. =302/JPT

APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818
